scripts.deploy:local: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network localhost --reset
scripts.deploy:devnode: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network devnode --deployment-id payid-devnode
scripts.deploy:local-fork: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network localFork --deployment-id local-fork-v1
scripts.deploy:lisk-sepolia: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network liskSepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/liskSepolia.json --deployment-id lisk-sepolia-v1
scripts.deploy:monad: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network monadTestnet --parameters ignition/parameters/monadTestnet.json --deployment-id monad-testnet-v1
scripts.deploy:polygon-amoy: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network polygonAmoy --parameters ignition/parameters/polygonAmoy.json --deployment-id polygon-amoy-v1
scripts.deploy:sepolia: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network sepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/sepolia.json --deployment-id sepolia-v1
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network baseSepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/baseSepolia.json --deployment-id base-sepolia-v1
scripts.deploy:moonbase: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network moonbaseAlpha --parameters ignition/parameters/moonbaseAlpha.json --deployment-id moonbase-alpha-v1
scripts.deploy:polygon: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network polygon --parameters ignition/parameters/polygon.json --deployment-id polygon-v1
scripts.deploy:base: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network base --parameters ignition/parameters/base.json --deployment-id base-v1
scripts.deploy:moonbeam: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network moonbeam --parameters ignition/parameters/moonbeam.json --deployment-id moonbeam-v1
scripts.deploy:moonriver: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network moonriver --parameters ignition/parameters/moonriver.json --deployment-id moonriver-v1
scripts.deploy:zerog-newton: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network zeroGTestnet --parameters ignition/parameters/zeroGNewton.json --deployment-id zerog-newton-v1
scripts.deploy:zerog-galileo: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network zeroGGalileo --parameters ignition/parameters/zeroGGalileo.json --deployment-id zerog-galileo-v1
scripts.deploy:zerog-mainnet: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network zeroGMainnet --parameters ignition/parameters/zeroGMainnet.json --deployment-id zerog-mainnet-v1
scripts.deploy:arbitrum-sepolia: bun hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PayID.ts --network arbitrumSepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/arbitrumSepolia.json --deployment-id arbitrum-sepolia-v1
scripts.deploy:all-testnet: bun run deploy:lisk-sepolia && bun run deploy:monad && bun run deploy:polygon-amoy && bun run deploy:sepolia && bun run deploy:base-sepolia && bun run deploy:moonbase && bun run deploy:zerog-newton && bun run deploy:arbitrum-sepolia
